'''Kaoln''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who crewed aboard a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nuendo Rash]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] male, Kaoln was part of the crew of a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nuendo Rash]]. While transporting [[Grain/Legends|grain]] to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] the ship stopped on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] where servants of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] waited to confront Rash—who owed the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] twenty thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]—in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. After leaving Mos Eisley, Captain Rash dumped the cargo of grain over [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] despite the protestations of [[First Mate/Legends|First Mate]] [[Hutch (cyborg)|Hutch]] and Kaoln who believed that the grain was needed to fool a customs inspection.<ref name="WNTD" />
